title: TacZMC
description: This is a simple and lightweight modpack that adds an amazing set of weapons to Minecraft! Created using Timeless and Classic Zero, all credit goes to the modmakers and their amazing work.
body:
This is a simple and lightweight modpack made using Timeless and Classics Zero and some addons. The modpack adds a variety of new weapons to your arsenal, including melee and throwables. feel free to add on whatever extra mods that you'd like! 

Credit goes to the creators of the mod TacZ and their amazing work!
